summary: Iteration 163: Cancelled Participant Status Fix Testing. All backend and frontend tests passed. The fix correctly handles the scenario where a participant cancels after accepting and guaranteeing - the business status 'cancelled_by_participant' is now preserved and not overwritten by 'guarantee_released'.

passed_tests.backend_timeline_counters_exclude_cancel: PASS - Timeline API correctly excludes cancelled participants from accepted/guaranteed/pending counters
passed_tests.backend_organizer_sees_cancellation_labe: PASS - Organizer timeline shows 'Participation annulée par [Nom]' for cancelled participants
passed_tests.backend_participant_sees_cancellation_la: PASS - Participant timeline shows 'Vous avez annulé votre participation' for cancelled items
passed_tests.backend_cancelled_in_past_bucket: PASS - Cancelled participations are correctly placed in 'past' bucket (historique)
passed_tests.backend_no_action_buttons_for_cancelled: PASS - Cancelled participants have no 'quit', 'remind', 'accept', or 'decline' actions
passed_tests.backend_guarantee_released_is_terminal: PASS - guarantee_released status is treated as terminal (placed in past, no actions)
passed_tests.frontend_organizer_dashboard: PASS - Dashboard loads correctly with 46 timeline cards, 'Participation annulée' badges visible
passed_tests.frontend_past_tab_cancelled_badges: PASS - Past tab shows 3 'Participation annulée' badges and 4 'Annulé' badges
passed_tests.frontend_participant_dashboard: PASS - Participant dashboard shows cancelled items with correct labels
passed_tests.frontend_appointment_detail_badge: PASS - Appointment detail page shows 'Participation annulée' badge for cancelled participant in ParticipantsSection

appointments.py lines 985-990: organizer timeline uses active_non_org which excludes cancelled/declined/guarantee_released - VERIFIED
appointments.py lines 1047-1063: organizer timeline adds 'Participation annulée par [Nom]' label - VERIFIED
appointments.py lines 1141-1146: participant timeline adds 'Vous avez annulé votre participation' label - VERIFIED
appointments.py line 1185: guarantee_released added to _is_past_item terminal statuses - VERIFIED
OrganizerDashboard.js lines 42-52: getParticipantStatusBadge handles guarantee_released as 'Participation annulée' - VERIFIED
ParticipantsSection.js lines 14-20: badges include guarantee_released → 'Participation annulée' - VERIFIED
InvitationStatusBadge.js lines 38-43: guarantee_released case renders 'Participation annulée' - VERIFIED
InvitationResponseSection.js lines 165-178: cancelled/guarantee_released shows 'Vous avez annulé votre participation' + 'Garantie libérée' - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data with cancelled participants
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cancelled participant status fix fully verified. Key behaviors: (1) release_guarantee() preserves terminal business statuses, (2) cancelled participants excluded from timeline counters, (3) explicit French labels for cancelled state, (4) guarantee_released treated as alias for cancellation in all frontend mappings. The fix ensures that when a participant cancels after accepting and guaranteeing, the organizer sees 'Participation annulée' (not 'Non sécurisé' or 'Invité') and the participant sees 'Vous avez annulé votre participation' (not raw 'guarantee_released').
